sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: T-Mobile US Announces Upcoming Board Member Resignation
feed.summary: T-Mobile US announced that director Abdurazak Mudesir will resign from its board and governance committee, effective March 31, 2026. The company clarified that his departure is not due to disagreements over T-Mobile's operations or policies, indicating a routine transition. This move will necessitate adjustments in board composition and oversight responsibilities.

feed.title: Earnings Season Anticipation: HPE Faces Market Volatility
feed.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE) is preparing to release its quarterly earnings report amid concerns about market volatility, rising oil prices, and geopolitical tensions. Despite a robust gross margin, the company faces profitability challenges and its stock has been trading down due to export restrictions. Analysts currently have a neutral sentiment, noting potential undervaluation but also highlighting the need for strategic adjustments to boost shareholder value.

feed.title: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) Hits New 1-Year Low - Time to Sell?
feed.summary: AvalonBay Communities (NYSE:AVB) reached a new 52-week low of $160.43, trading below its 50- and 200-day moving averages, despite a recent dividend increase to $1.78 quarterly for a 4.4% yield. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" rating for the stock with a consensus target price of $198.44. The company reported a modest beat in its last quarterly earnings with $2.85 EPS and $767.9M revenue, maintaining a market cap of $22.54 billion and significant institutional ownership.

feed.title: Domino's Cost Edge and Digital Prowess Should Drive Continued Pizza Market Share Gains
feed.summary: Domino's Pizza is poised to gain market share due to its value-oriented menu, bolstered by technology, convenience, and continuous innovation. The company's strong international franchisee base and marketing efforts have already driven significant sales growth, outpacing the broader global foodservice industry. Analysts anticipate continued system growth for Domino's, projecting 6.1% over the next five years compared to 4.5% for the industry.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley enters bitcoin ETF race with market-leading low fee
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley plans to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with a fee of 14 basis points, making it the lowest-cost option on the market if approved. This strategic move could ignite a fee war and attract significant assets due to the bank's extensive wealth management network. Given that spot Bitcoin ETFs offer similar exposure, the lower fee could prompt financial advisors to shift client funds from higher-cost competitors.

feed.title: Broadcom’s Expertise In SerDes And DSP Drives Success In An AI World (NASDAQ:AVGO)
feed.summary: Broadcom is leveraging its expertise in SerDes and DSP to dominate high-speed AI chip interconnects and custom accelerator co-designs, leading to significant AI-driven revenue growth. Despite strong technical moats and a projected three-year revenue CAGR of 36%, valuation concerns arise from potential overinvestment in AI, customer shifts (like Google’s engagement with MediaTek), and stock-based compensation dilution. With a market cap near $1.51 trillion and 43% FCF margins, the stock is rated a Hold, as much of its AI upside appears to be priced in.

feed.title: T-Mobile board member Mudesir to resign March 31
feed.summary: T-Mobile US Inc. announced that board member Abdurazak Mudesir will resign from the company's board of directors, effective March 31, 2026. Mudesir's decision to step down from both the board and the Nominating, Corporate Governance and Compliance Committee was communicated on March 26, 2026. The company clarified that his resignation is not due to any disagreements regarding T-Mobile's operations, policies, or practices.

feed.title: AT&T sets May 1 payout date for common and preferred dividends
feed.summary: AT&T has announced quarterly dividends for both its common and preferred shares. A dividend of $0.2775 per common share will be paid on May 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 10, 2026. The company also declared dividends for its Series A and Series C preferred stocks, with specific amounts per preferred share and depositary share.

feed.title: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC Stock (STX) Closed Down by 8.00% on Mar 27: Key Drivers Unveiled
feed.summary: Seagate Technology Holdings PLC (STX) stock closed down 8.00% on March 27 due to investor concerns triggered by Google's new AI model, TurboQuant, which may reduce memory storage needs. This technological breakthrough in AI efficiency has raised questions about future demand for memory products, impacting Seagate and the broader memory-chip industry. Additionally, company-specific risks like a high debt-to-equity ratio and insider selling contributed to investor apprehension.

feed.title: T-Mobile - Abdurazak Mudesir to resign from T-Mobile US board effective March 31, 2026 - SEC filing
feed.summary: Abdurazak Mudesir is set to resign from the T-Mobile US board of directors, with his resignation becoming effective on March 31, 2026. This information was disclosed in an SEC filing by T-Mobile. The article also provides recent news on T-Mobile, including collaborations, analyst rating adjustments, dividend declarations, and strategic partnerships.

feed.title: Pool Corp (POOL) director makes small 45-share acquisition
feed.summary: Pool Corp director David G. Whalen reported a small acquisition of 45 shares of common stock at $202.82 per share on March 26, 2026. This transaction is classified as a small acquisition under Rule 16a-6, not an open-market purchase. Following this acquisition, Whalen directly owns 7,767 shares of POOL common stock.

feed.title: iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF (NASDAQ: ESGU) - Share Price
feed.summary: The iShares ESG Aware MSCI USA ETF (ESGU) is currently trading at $140.39, representing a 1.70% decrease relative to its opening price today and a 1.89% decline over the past seven days. The article provides detailed share price performance over the current year, last year, and financial years, alongside a historical daily movement table stretching from March 2026 back to February 2026.

feed.title: T-Mobile US (TMUS) director Abdurazak Mudesir to step down from board
feed.summary: T-Mobile US announced that Abdurazak Mudesir will resign from its Board of Directors and the Nominating, Corporate Governance and Compliance Committee, effective March 31, 2026. The company stated that his resignation is not due to any disagreement regarding its operations, policies, or practices. This information was detailed in a recent 8-K filing.

feed.title: Pool Corp (NASDAQ: POOL) CFO reports small insider share acquisition
feed.summary: Pool Corp's CFO and Senior VP, Melanie M. Hart, acquired 8 shares of common stock at $202.48 per share in an exempt Rule 16a-6 transaction, increasing her direct holdings to 26,387 shares. This small, routine insider acquisition is classified as neutral in terms of market impact and sentiment. The transaction was filed on March 27, 2026, stemming from an event on March 25, 2026.

feed.title: Stay informed with the top movers within the S&P500 index on Friday.
feed.summary: This article provides an overview of the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index during Friday's trading session. It lists specific companies like ETR, BF.B, and CPB among the gainers, highlighting their stock performance and recent changes. Conversely, it identifies companies such as DDOG, COIN, and MRNA as top losers, detailing their respective stock declines.

feed.title: Entera Bio Announces Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Business Updates
feed.summary: Entera Bio reported its full-year 2025 financial results and provided updates on its pipeline, including significant progress with EB613 for osteoporosis, EB612 for hypoparathyroidism, and EB618 for metabolic syndromes. The company submitted a streamlined Phase 3 protocol for EB613, secured FDA alignment on BMD as a primary endpoint, and expanded its collaboration with OPKO Health for EB612. Financially, Entera Bio ended 2025 with $14.9 million in cash and cash equivalents, experiencing a net loss of $11.4 million.

feed.title: Apple launches $2.9M renovation at Elk Grove campus
feed.summary: Apple Inc. is undertaking a $2.9 million interior renovation of several large buildings it owns in Elk Grove, California. The company has owned these buildings for decades. This renovation project focuses on updating the interior of its campus.

feed.title: Fastenal posts Q1 webcast timing, presentation due 6 a.m. CT
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (Nasdaq:FAST) has announced that its conference call to discuss 2026 first-quarter results and current operations will be held on Monday, April 13, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. central time. The presentation, providing supplemental information, will be available at 6:00 a.m. central time on the same day. An online archive of the webcast will be accessible shortly after the call and will remain available until June 1, 2026.

feed.title: [Form 4] FUEL TECH, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Fuel Tech, Inc.'s Chief Financial Officer, Ellen T. Albrecht, reported an acquisition of 8,350 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 24, 2026, as equity compensation. These RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments over three years. This transaction was filed via a Form 4 with the SEC.

feed.title: Daniel O'Day sells shares at Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ: GILD)
feed.summary: Daniel O'Day, a reporting person for Gilead Sciences (NASDAQ: GILD), filed a Form 144 notifying the SEC of proposed sales of Common shares. The filing lists examples of dispositions, including sales of 115,640 shares for $17,346,000 on February 5, 2026, and $15,611,400 on January 23, 2026. This Form 144 is a routine regulatory disclosure and does not confirm completed sales, which would be shown in subsequent SEC filings.

feed.title: Fastenal Breaks Ground on $90 Million Distribution Center in Carroll County
feed.summary: Fastenal has broken ground on a new $90 million distribution center in Carroll County, Georgia, set to replace a legacy facility in the Atlanta metro area. The state-of-the-art center is expected to create around 280 jobs and will support Fastenal branches and customers throughout the Southeast. This project is a collaborative effort involving the City of Carrollton, Carroll Tomorrow, and the Carrollton Development Authority, underscoring its role in regional economic development.

feed.title: Five9 (NASDAQ: FIVN) seeks board declassification, charter vote May 20, 2026
feed.summary: Five9, Inc. (NASDAQ: FIVN) is holding its 2026 Annual Meeting on May 20, 2026, where stockholders will vote on several key proposals, including a phased declassification of the Board of Directors and the removal of supermajority voting requirements from its charter. These significant corporate governance changes aim to increase accountability and align with stockholder feedback, requiring an affirmative 66 2/3% vote for each amendment. Additionally, stockholders will elect two Class III directors, provide an advisory vote on executive compensation, and ratify KPMG LLP as the independent auditor for 2026.

feed.title: Fuel Tech (NASDAQ: FTEK) CEO receives 20,850 RSUs compensation award
feed.summary: Fuel Tech (NASDAQ: FTEK) President and CEO Vincent J. Arnone was granted 20,850 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on March 24, 2026, as a compensation award. These RSUs, each representing a contingent right to one share of FTEK common stock, will vest in three equal annual installments starting one year from the grant date. The award, valued at $0.0000 per unit, signifies a direct holding for Arnone, with shares to be delivered upon vesting under the company's RSU Award Agreement.

feed.title: [Form 4] FUEL TECH, INC. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: FUEL TECH, INC. Senior Vice President of Sales, William E. Cummings Jr., reported the acquisition of 6,250 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) as equity compensation. These RSUs represent a contingent right to receive one share of FTEK common stock per unit. The shares will vest in three equal installments over three years, subject to the company's RSU award agreement.

feed.title: Darden Restaurants (NYSE: DRI) grows sales, reshapes brands and boosts EPS
feed.summary: Darden Restaurants reported increased sales and mixed earnings in its latest quarter, with year-to-date sales growing 7.8% to $9.49 billion, driven by same-restaurant growth, new units, and the Chuy’s acquisition. The company is actively reshaping its brand portfolio by selling Olive Garden Canada and planning to close or convert 14 Bahama Breeze locations, while forecasting overall sales growth of 9.5% and 70 new restaurant openings for fiscal year 2026. Despite a slight dip in quarterly net earnings, year-to-date EPS from continuing operations rose to $6.91, supported by solid operating income and strong cash flows.

feed.title: Major Frontline (NYSE: FRO) holder details 35.6% stake and swap exposure
feed.summary: Frontline plc's major shareholder group, comprising Hemen Holding, Greenwich Holdings, and C.K. Limited, has disclosed a 35.6% beneficial ownership stake in the company, amounting to 79,145,703 Ordinary Shares. The filing also notes the appointment of Mikkel Storm Weum, an investment director from a related entity, to Frontline's board, suggesting potential control over the company's management. Additionally, the group revealed a new cash-settled total return swap providing economic exposure to 3,000,000 notional shares without voting rights.

feed.title: Fermi Inc. (NASDAQ: FRMI) takes $165M project loan for Matador
feed.summary: Fermi Inc. has secured a senior secured term loan facility of up to $165.0 million to finance six Siemens SGT-800 gas turbines for its Project Matador. The loan, provided by Beal lenders to its subsidiary FTW II, carries an interest rate of 12.00% per annum, a 1% unused commitment fee, and an exit fee of $37.0 million less cumulative interest and commitment fees paid at maturity. The obligations are secured by first-priority liens on the financed equipment and guaranteed by Fermi Inc., which also committed to a minimum equity contribution of $5,490,000.

feed.title: Genesco (NYSE: GCO) names CEO Mimi Vaughn principal accounting officer
feed.summary: Genesco Inc. announced that its President and CEO, Mimi E. Vaughn, has been appointed principal accounting officer, effective March 26, 2026. This follows Cassandra E. Harris's departure after completing her consulting role as principal accounting officer on March 25, 2026. Ms. Vaughn, who also serves as Interim CFO, will not receive additional compensation for these duties and will serve until a successor is named.

feed.title: 4.96M shares registered for resale by flyExclusive (FLYX) — no proceeds to company
feed.summary: flyExclusive (FLYX) has registered 4.96 million Class A shares for resale by existing stockholders through an S-3 filing. The company will not receive any proceeds from these sales, which will go directly to the selling stockholders. This registration, combined with previously registered shares, represents approximately 92.2% of the fully diluted Class A shares as of February 28, 2026, with no lock-up restrictions on the shares being offered.

feed.title: Executive pay and board control in Gaia (NASDAQ: GAIA) 2026 proxy
feed.summary: Gaia, Inc. is holding its 2026 annual shareholder meeting on April 23, 2026, where shareholders will vote on electing six directors and the advisory approval of named executive officer compensation. Founder and Chairman Jirka Rysavy maintains significant control due to dual-class stock, enabling him to elect all directors and influence proposals. The company details its executive compensation philosophy, board diversity, and financial relationships, including a recent divestiture with its former CEO.

feed.title: Fathom Holdings (FTHM) CEO gifts 39,342 shares but keeps large stake
feed.summary: Fathom Holdings CEO Marco Fregenal gifted 39,342 shares of common stock on March 26, 2026, a transaction valued at $0.00 per share. Despite the large gift, Fregenal retains a substantial direct holding of 1,419,703 common shares, along with indirect holdings and performance rights tied to an additional 250,000 shares. This insider transaction was reported as a bona fide gift, not a market sale, and is considered neutral in filing impact and sentiment.

feed.title: 14 J.P. Morgan ETFs will switch exchange listings on April 16
feed.summary: J.P. Morgan Asset Management announced that 14 of its ETFs will switch exchange listings effective April 16, 2026. The funds, including JPHY, JEMA, and several BetaBuilders ETFs, will move between Cboe BZX, NYSE Arca, and Nasdaq exchanges. This change only affects the listing exchanges and not the funds' management or investment objectives.

feed.title: Larry Fink calls for Social Security reform, says investing a portion of funds could strengthen the program
feed.summary: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink has proposed reforms to Social Security, suggesting that investing a portion of its funds "carefully, broadly, and over decades" could strengthen the program and allow Americans to build wealth. He emphasized that this would not privatize Social Security but rather diversify its investments, similar to the federal Thrift Savings Plan. Fink highlighted that without reform, the Social Security trust fund faces insolvency by 2032, potentially leading to a 24% benefit cut for recipients.

feed.title: Debt to equity ratio of Block, Inc. Class A – BSESOF:SQ3
feed.summary: The article displays the debt to equity ratio for Block, Inc. Class A, identified by the ticker BSESOF:SQ3 on TradingView. It indicates that the market is currently closed with no trades. The provided data focuses on the financial metrics for this specific company.

feed.title: Camden Property Trust names new CEO amid C-suite shakeup
feed.summary: Ric Campo, the co-founder and long-time CEO of Camden Property Trust, has stepped down as part of the multifamily company's succession plan. He has been replaced by a new CEO. Campo's career with the development company spans 40 years, making him a significant figure in the industry.

feed.title: The ROV Electrification Inflection Point
feed.summary: The article discusses the crucial shift towards electrification in Remotely Operated Vehicles (ROVs), highlighting it as an inflection point that will redefine subsea operations. It emphasizes that electrification offers significant operational expenditure (OPEX) savings, improved performance, and enhanced data collection capabilities compared to traditional hydraulic systems. The piece urges ROV contractors to view this transition not merely as a fleet refresh but as a strategic repositioning to secure market share in the evolving offshore energy sector.

feed.title: 5.00% Callable Notes due 2031 — Bank of America (NYSE: BAC)
feed.summary: Bank of America (NYSE: BAC) is offering 5.00% Fixed Rate Callable Notes due April 22, 2031. These senior, unsecured obligations will accrue interest semi-annually and are callable by BAC starting April 22, 2027. The notes are offered at 100.00% of principal with an underwriting discount, and a potential hedging-related charge may apply.

feed.title: HNR Acquisition Corp Announces Production Increases from Chemical Treatment Program
feed.summary: HNR Acquisition Corp (HNRA) reported successful oil production increases from a chemical stimulation program initiated in June 2024 in its Permian Basin properties. A pilot program on 24 wells yielded an additional 80+ barrels of oil per day (BOPD), and the company plans to expand this treatment to about 100 wells to eventually increase production by an estimated 250 BOPD by year-end 2024. This method is considered a safer, faster, and more economical way to enhance production, though results typically last around six months.

feed.title: Top Performing Leveraged/Inverse ETFs: 10/29/2023
feed.summary: This article identifies the top-performing leveraged and inverse ETFs from the week ending October 29, 2023. It explains that these funds can move rapidly due to leverage and lists the top ten, primarily inverse energy and high-beta/tech indices, along with one leveraged natural gas ETF. The article attributes the movements to factors like falling oil prices, high interest rates, disappointing earnings, and weather conditions.

feed.title: Apollo, BlackRock Deny Asking Kirkland To Abandon Optimum
feed.summary: Apollo, Ares, and BlackRock have denied accusations by Optimum Communications that they "bullied" Kirkland & Ellis LLP into withdrawing as Optimum's transaction counsel. Optimum claims this alleged pressure was retaliation for a collusion lawsuit it filed in New York federal court.

feed.title: FRT SEC Filings - Federal Realty Op Lp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to Federal Realty Op Lp (FRT) SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports, along with insider trading information. It highlights the company's financial performance, property portfolio, and risk factors through disclosures. Stock Titan enhances these filings with AI-powered summaries to help users quickly understand key points and material events.

feed.title: Fresenius Medical Care Stock: Key Business Drivers and Investment Considerations for North American Investors
feed.summary: Fresenius Medical Care is a global leader in dialysis services and products, with a significant presence in North America, particularly the U.S. The company's business model, which integrates product manufacturing and service delivery through clinics, provides resilience and predictable revenue streams. North American investors find the stock relevant due to its dominant U.S. market share, exposure to an aging population, and strategic investments in value-based care and digital health, alongside stable financial performance and a consistent dividend policy.

feed.title: FMC SEC Filings - Fmc Corp 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides comprehensive access to FMC Corporation's SEC filings, including 10-K, 10-Q, and 8-K reports, vital for investors tracking the agricultural sciences company's financial and strategic developments. It details how the company uses these filings to disclose financial condition, restructuring activities, and governance, enhanced with AI-powered summaries for easier interpretation. Recent filings highlight director stock acquisitions through dividend equivalents and significant corporate actions like Project Foundation for cost optimization and amendments to credit agreements.

feed.title: Freedom Holding Corp.: Moody’s Assesses Freedom Bank Kazakhstan’s Financial Strength
feed.summary: Moody’s Ratings has assigned Freedom Bank Kazakhstan long-term deposit ratings of Ba3 with a stable outlook, reflecting its high growth rates, development of retail lending and digital products, and reduced reliance on investment income. The bank is integrating into the broader Freedom Holding Corp. ecosystem, which is actively expanding its geographical footprint across 21 countries and developing a unified digital platform called Freedom SuperApp. This expansion and ecosystem strategy aim to scale the business into new markets and offer a comprehensive suite of financial and digital services.

feed.title: Current ratio of Verizon Communications Inc. – BSESOF:BAC
feed.summary: This article provides financial data for Verizon Communications Inc. (BSESOF:BAC), specifically focusing on its current ratio. The content is presented as a snapshot from TradingView, displaying the period, value, and change associated with the current ratio.

feed.title: Texas Instruments Inc Stock (TXN) Moved Down by 3.52% on Mar 27: What Investors Need To Know
feed.summary: Texas Instruments Inc (TXN) stock declined 3.52% on March 27, influenced by a "Hold" rating from Wells Fargo, insider selling activity, and a general cooling sentiment across the semiconductor sector. Analysts maintain a "Hold" consensus with a diverse price target range, reflecting tempered expectations for the company. Technical indicators show neutral to oversold conditions, while fundamental analysis highlights the company's significant revenue and net profit within the Technology Equipment industry.

feed.title: Market Chatter: Occidental Petroleum CEO Hollub Preparing to Retire
feed.summary: Market rumors suggest that Occidental Petroleum CEO Vicki Hollub is making preparations to retire. This unconfirmed report from Seeking Alpha indicates a potential leadership transition at the major oil company.

feed.title: Halliburton hits two-year high as J.P. Morgan sees little Q1 earnings impact from Iran war
feed.summary: Halliburton's stock reached a two-year high after J.P. Morgan reiterated its Overweight rating and raised its price target to $40. Analysts anticipate that the company's Q1 earnings will remain consistent with estimates despite ongoing Middle East tensions. The stock was up 3.7% to $40.36.

feed.title: Ball Corp reports regional decline in recycled aluminium use in 2025
feed.summary: Ball Corporation reported a decline in the proportion of recycled aluminium used in its beverage packaging in North and Central America and South America in 2025, although the EMEA region saw an increase. Globally, 74% of the aluminium used was from recycled materials, unchanged from the previous year. The company aims for 85% recycled content by 2030 and collaborates with industry partners to improve recycling rates and design.

feed.title: Power Check: Entergy, Eaton and KLA
feed.summary: David Spika of Turtle Creek Wealth Advisors joined 'Power Lunch' to discuss his investing perspective on three specific stocks: Entergy, Eaton, and KLA. The segment provided Spika's insights on these companies for investors.
